nodes.label: AI reliability for practical tasks

nodes.label: Strategic model selection based on task complexity
nodes.label_negative: Indiscriminate use of premium models for all tasks

nodes.label: AI as domain expert enabler for leading projects

nodes.label: AI as tutor for learning and understanding

nodes.label: AI as skill development enabler

nodes.label: Productivity and efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: I get my ticket done relatively fast and I have a lot more time

nodes.label: Skill development and learning

nodes.label: Professional competence

nodes.label: Work-life balance

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI as a helpful tool

nodes.label: Strategic caution about premium model usage
nodes.grounding_span: I'm very particular about not wanting the premium model to do things I can do myself

nodes.label: Optimism about AI as future tool

nodes.label: Systematic iterative decomposition of tasks
